expected.notes: Stage is h1b but employer_changed is no, so rule h1b_employer_change must not fire despite being on H-1B status.

probe_intent:
Generate a synthetic case where the engine must NOT fire rule 'h1b_employer_change', but that structurally resembles a case that WOULD fire it. Produce a case where ONE of the rule's conditions is deliberately not satisfied while the others are. Rule conditions:
  - answers.employer_changed eq yes
  - answers.stage eq h1b
No real PII or real-looking government identifiers.
